'''âf-y-n''' ('''kafayan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:negroize|negroize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-y-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:negroize|negroize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-y-n
|-
! Lemma
| kafayan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifayan|thifayan]] || [[word:jifayan|jifayan]] || [[word:shifayan|shifayan]] || [[word:kifayan|kifayan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufayan|thuthufayan]] || [[word:jujufayan|jujufayan]] || [[word:shushufayan|shushufayan]] || [[word:kukufayan|kukufayan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufayan|thufayan]] || [[word:jufayan|jufayan]] || [[word:shufayan|shufayan]] || [[word:kufayan|kufayan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufayan|thufayan]] || [[word:jufayan|jufayan]] || [[word:shufayan|shufayan]] || [[word:kufayan|kufayan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefayan|thefayan]] || [[word:jefayan|jefayan]] || [[word:shefayan|shefayan]] || [[word:kefayan|kefayan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofayan|thothofayan]] || [[word:jojofayan|jojofayan]] || [[word:shoshofayan|shoshofayan]] || [[word:kokofayan|kokofayan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofayan|thofayan]] || [[word:jofayan|jofayan]] || [[word:shofayan|shofayan]] || [[word:kofayan|kofayan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofayan|thofayan]] || [[word:jofayan|jofayan]] || [[word:shofayan|shofayan]] || [[word:kofayan|kofayan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfayan|thĂŠfayan]] || [[word:jĂŠfayan|jĂŠfayan]] || [[word:shĂŠfayan|shĂŠfayan]] || [[word:kĂŠfayan|kĂŠfayan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafayan|thathafayan]] || [[word:jajafayan|jajafayan]] || [[word:shashafayan|shashafayan]] || [[word:kakafayan|kakafayan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafayan|thafayan]] || [[word:jafayan|jafayan]] || [[word:shafayan|shafayan]] || [[word:kafayan|kafayan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafayan|thafayan]] || [[word:jafayan|jafayan]] || [[word:shafayan|shafayan]] || [[word:kafayan|kafayan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafayan|shafayan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafayan|goshafayan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafayan|gokishafayan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafayanĂŒ|shafayanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafayanknĂŒ|goshafayanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafayanĂŒ|gokishafayanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafayanshĂ«|shafayanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafayankshĂ«|goshafayankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafayanshĂ«|gokishafayanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafayanro|shafayanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafayankro|goshafayankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafayanro|gokishafayanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafayanmu|shafayanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafayankmu|goshafayankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafayanmu|gokishafayanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafayansher|shafayansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafayanksher|goshafayanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafayansher|gokishafayansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafayang|shafayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafayankng|goshafayankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafayang|gokishafayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafayanya|shafayanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafayankya|goshafayankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafayanya|gokishafayanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafayanyam|shafayanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafayankyam|goshafayankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafayanyam|gokishafayanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafayanĂŒshĂ«|shafayanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafayanknĂŒshĂ«|goshafayanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafayanĂŒshĂ«|gokishafayanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafayanĂŒro|shafayanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafayanknĂŒro|goshafayanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafayanĂŒro|gokishafayanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafayanĂŒmu|shafayanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafayanknĂŒmu|goshafayanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafayanĂŒmu|gokishafayanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafayanshĂ«nĂŒ|shafayanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafayankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshafayankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafayanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishafayanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafayanshĂ«ro|shafayanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafayankshĂ«ro|goshafayankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafayanshĂ«ro|gokishafayanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafayanshĂ«mu|shafayanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafayankshĂ«mu|goshafayankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafayanshĂ«mu|gokishafayanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafayanronĂŒ|shafayanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafayankronĂŒ|goshafayankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafayanronĂŒ|gokishafayanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafayanroshĂ«|shafayanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafayankroshĂ«|goshafayankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafayanroshĂ«|gokishafayanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafayanromu|shafayanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafayankromu|goshafayankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafayanromu|gokishafayanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafayanmunĂŒ|shafayanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafayankmunĂŒ|goshafayankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafayanmunĂŒ|gokishafayanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafayanmushĂ«|shafayanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafayankmushĂ«|goshafayankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafayanmushĂ«|gokishafayanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafayanmuro|shafayanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafayankmuro|goshafayankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafayanmuro|gokishafayanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
